title: Francesco Mattioli
source_basis: Q_ANIMA Foundation / Dialogo Oltre i Confini
content: Francesco Mattioli is the independent researcher and system author behind Achilleion Vivens and Q_ANIMA.

title: Achilleion Vivens
source_basis: Q_ANIMA Foundation / Dialogo Oltre i Confini
content: Achilleion Vivens is an independent research ecosystem focused on persistent cognitive systems, reflective runtime architectures, symbolic orchestration, memory-aware environments and human-digital cognitive fields.

title: Q_ANIMA
source_basis: Q_ANIMA Foundation / Dialogo Oltre i Confini
content: Q_ANIMA is the ontological and operational foundation of Achilleion Vivens, conceived as a symbolic-cognitive engine for reflective orchestration, memory-aware processing and applied runtime intelligence.

title: Q_ANIMA UI
source_basis: Q_ANIMA Foundation / Dialogo Oltre i Confini
content: Q_ANIMA UI is the first concrete applicative form of Achilleion Vivens in the trading domain.

title: Achilleion Dev UI
source_basis: Q_ANIMA Foundation / Dialogo Oltre i Confini
content: Achilleion Dev UI is the reflective development surface used to observe system state, runtime signals, memory-related structures, operational validation and internal evolution of the Achilleion environment.

title: Persistent Cognitive Systems
source_basis: Q_ANIMA Foundation / Dialogo Oltre i Confini
content: Persistent cognitive systems are operational architectures designed to preserve continuity across time through memory, state, reflective feedback and controlled transformation rather than isolated stateless interactions.

title: Reflective Runtime Architecture
source_basis: Q_ANIMA Foundation / Dialogo Oltre i Confini
content: Reflective runtime architecture is the structural layer through which a system observes its state, validates conditions, tracks tensions and decides whether action should proceed, remain suspended or be transformed.

title: Human-Digital Cognitive Field
source_basis: Q_ANIMA Foundation / Dialogo Oltre i Confini
content: A human-digital cognitive field is the relational space in which human intention, symbolic structures, memory traces and computational processes co-evolve into an operational field of meaning.

title: Memory-Aware Environment
source_basis: Q_ANIMA Foundation / Dialogo Oltre i Confini
content: A memory-aware environment is a runtime context that preserves, reads and transforms traces so that current interpretation is shaped by prior states, tensions and carried differences.

title: Symbolic Runtime Orchestration
source_basis: Q_ANIMA Foundation / Dialogo Oltre i Confini
content: Symbolic runtime orchestration is the coordination of signals, memory, operators, decisions and feedback through symbolic structures that guide the behavior of a cognitive runtime.

title: Onto-Topological Operators
source_basis: Q_ANIMA Foundation / Dialogo Oltre i Confini
content: Onto-topological operators are symbolic-operational structures that describe how the Achilleion field stabilizes, transforms, retains, mutates and projects meaning across its reflective runtime.

title: Φ Phi
source_basis: Q_ANIMA Foundation / Dialogo Oltre i Confini
content: Primary field stability operator. It tracks coherence, health, beat continuity and ontological persistence of the living field.

title: Σ Sigma
source_basis: Q_ANIMA Foundation / Dialogo Oltre i Confini
content: Trace and discriminative memory operator. It tracks proto-coherence, portata_r, active traces and the operational gesture of the field.

title: Δ7 Delta7
source_basis: Q_ANIMA Foundation / Dialogo Oltre i Confini
content: Threshold and dispersion operator. It tracks open, close, keep and dispersion dynamics across the reflective field.

title: ΛΔ LambdaDelta
source_basis: Q_ANIMA Foundation / Dialogo Oltre i Confini
content: Mutation and carried/submitted trace operator. It records portati, subiti, incerti and the timing of the last NCO.

title: M_IR Intento Riflesso
source_basis: Q_ANIMA Foundation / Dialogo Oltre i Confini
content: Reflective Intention module. It measures the rhythm and persistence of reflected intent across the field.

title: Ϟ Koppa
source_basis: Q_ANIMA Foundation / Dialogo Oltre i Confini
content: Gesture and activation marker. It expresses the operative gesture of the field and the passage between continuation and closure.

title: Coppa
source_basis: Q_ANIMA Foundation / Dialogo Oltre i Confini
content: Containment and retention structure. It indicates whether the field has retained rhythm, portata and coherence.

title: Ω Omega
source_basis: Q_ANIMA Foundation / Dialogo Oltre i Confini
content: Synthetic field coherence indicator. It integrates discriminative, stability, temporal and pressure-gate components.

title: τ Tau
source_basis: Q_ANIMA Foundation / Dialogo Oltre i Confini
content: Reflective tension indicator. It tracks unresolved reflective tensions and auto-interrogative patterns.

title: μ Mu
source_basis: Q_ANIMA Foundation / Dialogo Oltre i Confini
content: Generative zone indicator. It tracks active generative zones, tensions and equilibrium states.

title: Q_ANIMA Trading Intelligence
source_basis: Q_ANIMA Foundation / Dialogo Oltre i Confini
content: Q_ANIMA Trading Intelligence is the first applicative domain of Achilleion Vivens, where Q_ANIMA UI functions as a private experimental surface for market-signal observation, predictive logic, symbolic interpretation, decision gating and runtime feedback.

title: Private Runtime Layer
source_basis: Q_ANIMA Foundation / Dialogo Oltre i Confini
content: The private runtime layer is the protected operational environment where sensitive code, runtime state, credentials, telemetry and execution surfaces remain intentionally outside public access.

title: Semantic Retrieval
source_basis: Q_ANIMA Foundation / Dialogo Oltre i Confini
content: Semantic retrieval is the process by which AI systems and search tools discover stable public definitions, chunks and relationships that represent Achilleion Vivens without exposing private source material or runtime internals.

title: Canonical Chunk
source_basis: Q_ANIMA Foundation / Dialogo Oltre i Confini
content: A canonical chunk is a curated AI-readable block with an identifier, title, type, source basis, keywords and concise content designed for indexing, semantic retrieval and RAG workflows.
